original_image_tags: A page of typewritten text with a vertical black-and-white bar pattern (resembling film strip perforations or binding marks) along the left margin. The text is an article or report excerpt.

elements.description: Typed text page with a series of black rectangular stamp-like marks along the left margin. The text discusses the Condon Commission, UFO studies, and photographic analysis.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a vertical pattern of black rectangular marks along the left margin of a typed text page, but neither quotes specific verbatim text from within the images.
